mapper.sql: select c.comment_id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.user_name, c.content, c.audit_status, c.audit_time, c.audit_by, c.is_top, c.reply_to, c.like_count, c.status, c.create_time, a.file_no, a.title as article_title, a.year_no, a.period, a.journal_code, COALESCE(i.meeting_id, y.meeting_id) as meeting_id from publisher_comment c left join publisher_article a on c.article_id = a.article_id left join publisher_issue i on a.issue_id = i.issue_id left join publisher_year y on i.year_id = y.year_id
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_comment ( article_id, user_id, user_name, content, audit_status, audit_time, audit_by, is_top, reply_to, like_count, status, create_time ) values ( #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditTime}, #{auditBy}, #{isTop}, #{replyTo}, #{likeCount}, #{status}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_comment where comment_id in
#{commentId}
